name: 14q11_2_microdeletion_SUPT16H
description: 14q11.2 recurrent microdeletion / microduplication syndrome — ~0.6-1.5 Mb CNV flanked by direct-orientation SD blocks at 14q11.2 (paralog cassettes including OR-cluster duplicons and CRIP1/2 paralogs). Critical genes SUPT16H and CHD8 (the latter at 14q11.2 distal). Penetrance variable; ID, autism, craniofacial features.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD clusters with olfactory-receptor (OR4Q3/OR4M1) paralog cassettes at >95% identity; unique core contains SUPT16H, CHD8 (autism gene), RAB2B, CIDEB, METTL3.
